backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Luminia Group app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, wrapped in a React Query provider with a dark gold-tinted background.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for the Assured Tours & Travels division displaying a banner, image pair, six service cards, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) with image cards, launch badges, and a WhatsApp notify button per brand.
frontend/src/components/DiscountCountdow: Live countdown timer component with a gold luxury aesthetic that displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a promotional offer deadline.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Luminia Group logo, a portfolio brand list, and contact links (email, WhatsApp), along with a copyright notice and a Tawk.to live chat widget.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the Luminia Group logo, tagline, and a CTA button that smoothly scrolls to the subsidiaries section, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Section showcasing the Luminia Captures photography division with a service grid, banner/gallery images, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Section presenting Luminia TechLabs' tech services grid alongside a government services sub-section (Voter ID, Aadhaar, certificates), each card linking to a WhatsApp inquiry message.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote from Luminia Group with decorative gold dividers and a stats row showing 7 subsidiaries, infinite ambition, and one vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo button that scrolls to the top, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that becomes opaque on scroll.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSection.t: Renders a payment section with a two-step UPI/QR flow: first a 'Proceed to Pay' button, then a QR code display, followed by a WhatsApp confirmation message with a generated UTE reference.
Displays a 'Coming Soon' full-screen placeholder page with the Luminia Group logo, gold decorative elements, and a fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay component that shows detailed info (image carousel, description, enquire button) for a selected subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and WhatsApp enquiry integration.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Renders a grid of Luminia Group subsidiary cards with icons, taglines, and enquire buttons, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal on card click.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash overlay with animated particle rain, the Luminia logo, and an 'Enter' button that dismisses it and sets a sessionStorage flag to prevent repeat display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Cormorant Garamond font and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the gold/obsidian luxury theme, scrollbar styles, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Utility module exporting helper functions to open WhatsApp with pre-filled messages for bookings, notifications, government services, and payment confirmations using a fixed business number.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with luxury gold/obsidian color palette, Cormorant Garamond fonts, zero border-radius defaults, custom shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and requirements for the Luminia Group corporate website, including payment section and WhatsApp integration features.
